## Problem Statement

Describe the accessibility barrier or usability issue.

**Example:**

> The "Save" button is not announced correctly by screen readers because it only contains an icon and has no content description.

---

## User Impact

Who is affected by this issue?

* [ ] Screen reader users (TalkBack)
* [ ] Switch Access users
* [ ] Voice Access users
* [ ] Keyboard users
* [ ] Users with low vision
* [ ] Users requiring larger text sizes
* [ ] Users with color vision deficiencies
* [ ] Users with cognitive disabilities
* [ ] Other: ___________

Describe the impact:

---

## Current Behavior

Describe what happens today.

---

## Expected Behavior

Describe the accessible experience you would expect.

---

Where does this issue occur?

* Screen:

* Component:

* [ ] TalkBack
* [ ] Switch Access

---

## Suggested Improvement

Describe a possible solution, if you have one.

Examples:

* Add content descriptions to icon-only buttons.
* Ensure all interactive elements are keyboard-focusable.
* Increase color contrast.
* Support dynamic text scaling.
* Improve focus order between controls.
* Announce status changes using accessibility events.

---

## Accessibility Guidelines (Optional)

If known, reference any relevant guidance.

Examples:

* WCAG 2.2
* Android Accessibility Guidelines
* Material Design Accessibility Guidance

---

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, screen recordings, accessibility scanner results, or other supporting information.
